name: bamboohr-deploy-integration
description: Deploy BambooHR integrations to Vercel, Fly.io, and Cloud Run platforms. Use when deploying BambooHR-powered applications to production, configuring platform-specific secrets, or setting up deployment pipelines. Trigger with phrases like "deploy bamboohr", "bamboohr Vercel", "bamboohr production deploy", "bamboohr Cloud Run", "bamboohr Fly.io".
